title: ic_result envelope (Form B)
description: Used by ic-engine bridge. Emitted as the LAST line of stdout from the ic-engine subprocess. Parsed by _run_ic_engine() into the tool result's ic_result field.

script.description: Script name that ran inside ic-engine (e.g., 'ask.py', 'fetch_holdings.py'). Used by the cobol harness's SCRIPT_EXIT_RE regex.

exit_code.description: POSIX exit code. 0 = success; non-zero = failure. The harness picks this up via the same regex.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the script run in milliseconds.

hmac.description: Optional HMAC over the script's output, for clients that want to verify integrity. Synthesized by some agents in their narrative quote of the envelope; not always present in the actual envelope.

run_id.description: Optional: UUID for the run, useful for log correlation.
